stocks_intro_1: Amasheya abe yitshalomali elidume kakhulu amashumi eminyaka futhi amele izingxenye zobunini ezinkampanini.
stocks_intro_2: I-Bitcoin iyimali yedijithali eyasungulwa ngo-2009 esebenza ngokuzimela kunoma iyiphi inkampani noma uhulumeni.
stocks_intro_3: Kodwa ukuba neqhaza enkampanini kuhluke kanjani ekubeni nemali yedijithali efana ne-Bitcoin? Ake sibheke umehluko phakathi kwezinhlobo ezimbili zokutshalomali: I-Bitcoin & Amasheya.
point_1_summary_1: Lapho unayo i-Bitcoin, unobunini ngqo bempahla uqobo. Lapho unamasheya, unesiqephu senkampani, okusho ukuthi ukutshalomali kwakho kuncike ekusebenzeni kwenkampani, ezinqumweni zobuholi, nasempumelelweni yebhizinisi.
point_2_summary_1: I-Bitcoin inomkhawulo oqinile wezinhlamvu ezingu-21 million BTC ezizokhona.
point_2_summary_2: Izinkampani zingakhipha amasheya amasha nganoma yisiphi isikhathi, zinciphise iphesenti lobunini labanikazi abasele. Lokhu kusho ukuthi icesho lakho lenkampani liba lincane lapho amasheya amasha edalwa.
point_2_summary_3: Lokhu kungaphansi kwenfleshini ye-fiat, kodwa kusayinciphiso.
point_3_summary_1: I-Bitcoin isebenza kunethiwekhi engacentralized engenandawo eyodwa yokuhluleka. Ukutshalomali kwamasheya kuthintwa yingozi yomuntu obalulekile - uma i-CEO noma abaholi abanamandla bahamba, bagula, noma bathatha izinqumo ezimbi, ukutshalomali kwakho kungahlupheka kakhulu. Izinkampani zincike kakhulu emaqenjini azo obuholi.
point_4_summary_1: Intengo ye-Bitcoin inqunywa yimakethe kuphela ngesidingo nemithombo. Intengo yamasheya ngokuvamile ihlolwa kusetshenziswa ama-P/E ratios (Price-to-Earnings), abonisa ukuthi abatshali zimali bakhokha malini ngayo yonke idola yenzuzo yenkampani. Ama-P/E ratios aphezulu angabonisa amasheya akhishwe kakhulu, okwenza kunzima ukuthola inani elifanele.
point_5_summary_1: I-Bitcoin ithengiswa amahora angu-24 ngosuku, izinsuku ezingu-7 ngesonto kuzo zonke izimakethe emhlabeni.
point_5_summary_4: Izimakethe zamasheya zivulwa ngamahora ebhizinisi ngeviki kuphela, okulingamisa isikhathi ongathengisa noma uthenge ngaso ukutshalomali kwakho.
point_6_summary_1: Nge-Bitcoin, ungathatha ubunini bezinhlamvu zakho, okusho ukuthi ngempela zingezakho ngaphandle kokuncika kunoma yimuphi umuntu wesithathu.
point_6_summary_3: Amasheya adinga i-akhawunti yebroka futhi uthintwa yingozi yohlangothi oluphikisanayo - uma inkampani iya emadlozini noma ibroka yahluleka, ungalahlekelwa ukutshalomali kwakho.
point_7_summary_1: I-Bitcoin iyimpahla yenani elimisiwe enomkhawulo oqinile we-Bitcoin ezingu-21 million ezizokhona. Lokhu kuyenza ibe yisivikelo esikhulu senfleshini. Amasheya anokusebenza okuguqukayo ngenfleshini - ezinye izinkampani zisebenza kahle ngezinkathi zenfleshini ngenkathi ezinye zihlupheka. Akukho qiniso lokuthi isheya ethile izokuvikela enfleshini.
